heading: Certain recoupment prohibited
label: 5205a Certain recoupment prohibited
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Disaster Recovery Reform Act of 2018 and as part of the FAA Reauthorization Act of 2018, and not as part of the Robert T. Stafford Disaster Relief and Emergency Assistance Act which comprises this chapter.
DefinitionsFor definition of “Agency” as used in this section, see , set out as a note under .section 1203 of Pub. L. 115–254section 5122 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the Agency shall deem any covered disaster assistance to have been properly procured, provided, and utilized, and shall restore any funding of covered disaster assistance previously provided but subsequently withdrawn or deobligated.
provided to a local government pursuant to section 5170b, 5172, or 5173 of this title; and

children.label: A
children.text: the Agency deployed to the local government a Technical Assistance Contractor to review field operations, provide eligibility advice, and assist with day-to-day decisions;

children.label: B
children.text: the Technical Assistance Contractor provided inaccurate information to the local government; and

children.label: C
children.text: the local government relied on the inaccurate information to determine that relevant contracts were eligible, reasonable, and reimbursable.

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: c Effective date
children.text: This section shall be effective on .October 5, 2018
